Episode: Eric Weinstein Demands UFO Secrets From Pentagon Scientist
Eric Davis on camera asserts: 'The alleged Roswell crash was real. There was a there, there. It really happened.'
Davis states he has personally met approximately 5 people who worked on crash retrieval programs.
Weinstein challenges Davis: 'There's no physics in it. They're just — it defies the laws of physics. We haven't made progress. We have no physicists. How are they doing on this project decades in?'
Weinstein rejects the Manhattan-Project framing of US reverse-engineering programs: 'This thing is not a Manhattan Project.'
Eric Davis claims his research shows one should be able to create a traversable wormhole on demand, enabling transit to Alpha Centauri.
Weinstein criticizes physicists for not 'tweaking GR' — insisting current proposals are 'boring as sin' and the field has stagnated.
